predictions.question: Which counties have the highest number of customer outages reported at one time?
predictions.sparql_query:
PREFIX goo:        <https://ucf-henat.github.io/GeoOutageOnto/#>
PREFIX gokg:       <http://example.org/resource#>
PREFIX geosparql: <http://www.opengis.net/ont/geosparql#>
PREFIX geof:       <http://www.opengis.net/def/function/geosparql/>
PREFIX geo:        <http://www.w3.org/2003/01/geo/wgs84_pos#>
PREFIX xsd:        <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdf:        <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX rdfs:       <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX schema:     <http://schema.org/>
PREFIX units:      <http://www.opengis.net/def/uom/OGC/1.0/>

SELECT ?county ?countyLabel (MAX(?numOutages) AS ?maxOutages)
WHERE {
  ?rec a goo:CustomerOutageRecord ;
       goo:representsCounty ?county ;
       goo:numberOfOutages ?numOutages .
  ?county a goo:County ;
          rdfs:label ?countyLabel .
}
GROUP BY ?county ?countyLabel
ORDER BY DESC(?maxOutages)
LIMIT 10

predictions.question: Which ten customer outage records were the highest?
predictions.sparql_query:
PREFIX goo:        <https://ucf-henat.github.io/GeoOutageOnto/#>
PREFIX gokg:       <http://example.org/resource#>
PREFIX geosparql: <http://www.opengis.net/ont/geosparql#>
PREFIX geof:       <http://www.opengis.net/def/function/geosparql/>
PREFIX geo:        <http://www.w3.org/2003/01/geo/wgs84_pos#>
PREFIX xsd:        <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdf:        <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX rdfs:       <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX schema:     <http://schema.org/>
PREFIX units:      <http://www.opengis.net/def/uom/OGC/1.0/>

SELECT ?rec ?county ?countyLabel ?date ?numOutages
WHERE {
  ?rec a goo:CustomerOutageRecord ;
       goo:representsCounty ?county ;
       goo:recordDateTime ?date ;
       goo:numberOfOutages ?numOutages .
  ?county a goo:County ;
          rdfs:label ?countyLabel .
}
ORDER BY DESC(?numOutages)
LIMIT 10

predictions.question: Which customer outage records were recorded in the calendar year after 2021?
predictions.sparql_query:
PREFIX goo:        <https://ucf-henat.github.io/GeoOutageOnto/#>
PREFIX gokg:       <http://example.org/resource#>
PREFIX geosparql: <http://www.opengis.net/ont/geosparql#>
PREFIX geof:       <http://www.opengis.net/def/function/geosparql/>
PREFIX geo:        <http://www.w3.org/2003/01/geo/wgs84_pos#>
PREFIX xsd:        <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdf:        <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX rdfs:       <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX schema:     <http://schema.org/>
PREFIX units:      <http://www.opengis.net/def/uom/OGC/1.0/>

SELECT ?rec ?county ?countyLabel ?date ?numOutages
WHERE {
  ?rec a goo:CustomerOutageRecord ;
       goo:representsCounty ?county ;
       goo:recordDateTime ?date ;
       goo:numberOfOutages ?numOutages .
  ?county a goo:County ;
          rdfs:label ?countyLabel .
  FILTER (?date >= "2022-01-01T00:00:00Z"^^xsd:dateTime && ?date < "2023-01-01T00:00:00Z"^^xsd:dateTime)
}
ORDER BY ?date
LIMIT 10

sparql_interpretations.label: calendar year immediately after 2021
sparql_interpretations.rationale: The singular phrase 'the calendar year after 2021' can be read literally as 2022.
sparql_interpretations.sparql_query:
PREFIX goo:        <https://ucf-henat.github.io/GeoOutageOnto/#>
PREFIX gokg:       <http://example.org/resource#>

PREFIX rdf:        <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX rdfs:       <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX schema:     <http://schema.org/>
PREFIX units:      <http://www.opengis.net/def/uom/OGC/1.0/>

SELECT ?rec ?county ?countyLabel ?date ?numOutages
WHERE {
  ?rec a goo:CustomerOutageRecord ;
       goo:representsCounty ?county ;
       goo:recordDateTime ?date ;
       goo:numberOfOutages ?numOutages .
  ?county a goo:County ;
          rdfs:label ?countyLabel .
  FILTER (?date >= "2022-01-01T00:00:00Z"^^xsd:dateTime && ?date < "2023-01-01T00:00:00Z"^^xsd:dateTime)
}
ORDER BY ?date
LIMIT 10

sparql_interpretations.label: all calendar years after 2021

sparql_interpretations.sparql_query:

PREFIX schema:     <http://schema.org/>
PREFIX units:      <http://www.opengis.net/def/uom/OGC/1.0/>

SELECT ?rec ?county ?countyLabel ?date ?numOutages
WHERE {
  ?rec a goo:CustomerOutageRecord ;
       goo:representsCounty ?county ;
       goo:recordDateTime ?date ;
       goo:numberOfOutages ?numOutages .
  ?county a goo:County ;
          rdfs:label ?countyLabel .
  FILTER (?date >= "2022-01-01T00:00:00Z"^^xsd:dateTime)
}
ORDER BY ?date
LIMIT 10

predictions.question: Which nighttime-light images cover the Orlando-area county in 2025?
predictions.sparql_query:
PREFIX goo:        <https://ucf-henat.github.io/GeoOutageOnto/#>
PREFIX gokg:       <http://example.org/resource#>
PREFIX geosparql: <http://www.opengis.net/ont/geosparql#>
PREFIX geof:       <http://www.opengis.net/def/function/geosparql/>
PREFIX geo:        <http://www.w3.org/2003/01/geo/wgs84_pos#>
PREFIX xsd:        <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdf:        <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX rdfs:       <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX schema:     <http://schema.org/>
PREFIX units:      <http://www.opengis.net/def/uom/OGC/1.0/>

SELECT ?image ?county ?countyLabel ?imageDate
WHERE {
  ?image a goo:NTLImage ;
         goo:representsCounty ?county ;
         goo:acquisitionDateTime ?imageDate .
  ?county a goo:County ;
          rdfs:label ?countyLabel ;
          goo:locatedInState ?state .
  ?state a goo:State ;
         goo:statePostalCode "FL" .
  FILTER (CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?countyLabel)), "orange"))
  FILTER (?imageDate >= "2025-01-01T00:00:00Z"^^xsd:dateTime && ?imageDate < "2026-01-01T00:00:00Z"^^xsd:dateTime)
}
ORDER BY ?imageDate
LIMIT 10

predictions.question: Which jurisdiction is represented by the customer record with FIPS code 12075 and on the 15th of August 2017 at 8:15 PM?
predictions.sparql_query:
PREFIX goo:        <https://ucf-henat.github.io/GeoOutageOnto/#>
PREFIX gokg:       <http://example.org/resource#>
PREFIX geosparql: <http://www.opengis.net/ont/geosparql#>
PREFIX geof:       <http://www.opengis.net/def/function/geosparql/>
PREFIX geo:        <http://www.w3.org/2003/01/geo/wgs84_pos#>
PREFIX xsd:        <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdf:        <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX rdfs:       <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX schema:     <http://schema.org/>
PREFIX units:      <http://www.opengis.net/def/uom/OGC/1.0/>

SELECT ?county ?countyLabel ?rec ?date
WHERE {
  ?county a goo:County ;
          goo:fipsCode "12075" ;
          rdfs:label ?countyLabel .
  ?rec a goo:CustomerOutageRecord ;
       goo:representsCounty ?county ;
       goo:recordDateTime ?date .
  FILTER (?date >= "2017-08-15T20:15:00Z"^^xsd:dateTime && ?date < "2017-08-15T20:16:00Z"^^xsd:dateTime)
}
LIMIT 1

predictions.question: Which jurisdiction is represented by the first alphabetical order county in Florida on the 10th of the 3rd month in the last year of the 2010s?
predictions.sparql_query:
PREFIX goo:        <https://ucf-henat.github.io/GeoOutageOnto/#>
PREFIX gokg:       <http://example.org/resource#>
PREFIX geosparql: <http://www.opengis.net/ont/geosparql#>

PREFIX xsd:        <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdf:        <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>

SELECT ?county ?countyLabel ?image ?imageDate
WHERE {
  ?image a goo:NTLImage ;
         goo:representsCounty ?county ;
         goo:acquisitionDateTime ?imageDate .
  ?county a goo:County ;
          rdfs:label ?countyLabel ;
          goo:locatedInState ?state .
  ?state a goo:State ;

}
ORDER BY LCASE(STR(?countyLabel))
LIMIT 1

predictions.question: When was this outage record recorded?
predictions.sparql_query:
PREFIX goo:        <https://ucf-henat.github.io/GeoOutageOnto/#>
PREFIX gokg:       <http://example.org/resource#>
PREFIX geosparql: <http://www.opengis.net/ont/geosparql#>
PREFIX geof:       <http://www.opengis.net/def/function/geosparql/>
PREFIX geo:        <http://www.w3.org/2003/01/geo/wgs84_pos#>
PREFIX xsd:        <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdf:        <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX rdfs:       <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX schema:     <http://schema.org/>
PREFIX units:      <http://www.opengis.net/def/uom/OGC/1.0/>

SELECT ?rec ?date
WHERE {
  ?rec a goo:CustomerOutageRecord ;
       goo:recordDateTime ?date .
}
ORDER BY ?date
LIMIT 1

sparql_interpretations.label: under-specified outage record
sparql_interpretations.rationale: The deictic phrase 'this outage record' has no explicit record identifier in the template, so the query returns one bound outage record date.
sparql_interpretations.sparql_query:
PREFIX goo:        <https://ucf-henat.github.io/GeoOutageOnto/#>
PREFIX gokg:       <http://example.org/resource#>
PREFIX geosparql: <http://www.opengis.net/ont/geosparql#>
PREFIX geof:       <http://www.opengis.net/def/function/geosparql/>
PREFIX geo:        <http://www.w3.org/2003/01/geo/wgs84_pos#>
PREFIX xsd:        <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdf:        <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX rdfs:       <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX schema:     <http://schema.org/>
PREFIX units:      <http://www.opengis.net/def/uom/OGC/1.0/>

SELECT ?rec ?date
WHERE {
  ?rec a goo:CustomerOutageRecord ;
       goo:recordDateTime ?date .
}
ORDER BY ?date
LIMIT 1

predictions.question: How many outages were recorded in the customer outage record for the Florida county with the seat in Bronson, on August 15, 2017 at 20:15?
Which nighttime-light scene corresponds to the customer outage record for the Florida county with the seat in Bronson, on August 15, 2017 at 20:15?
Which outage map corresponds to the customer outage record for the Florida county with the largest city being Williston, on August 15, 2017 at 20:15?
Which severity prediction map was derived from the nighttime-light scene for Jacksonville's county in 2020, the 21st night of September?
Which satellite captured any random NTL image?
predictions.sparql_query:
PREFIX goo:        <https://ucf-henat.github.io/GeoOutageOnto/#>
PREFIX gokg:       <http://example.org/resource#>
PREFIX geosparql: <http://www.opengis.net/ont/geosparql#>
PREFIX geof:       <http://www.opengis.net/def/function/geosparql/>
PREFIX geo:        <http://www.w3.org/2003/01/geo/wgs84_pos#>
PREFIX xsd:        <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdf:        <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX rdfs:       <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX schema:     <http://schema.org/>
PREFIX units:      <http://www.opengis.net/def/uom/OGC/1.0/>

SELECT ?image ?satellite ?satelliteLabel
WHERE {
  ?image a goo:NTLImage ;
         goo:fromSatellite ?satellite .
  ?satellite a goo:Satellite .
  OPTIONAL { ?satellite rdfs:label ?satelliteLabel . }
}
LIMIT 1

predictions.question: Which sensor captured any random NTL image?
predictions.sparql_query:
PREFIX goo:        <https://ucf-henat.github.io/GeoOutageOnto/#>
PREFIX gokg:       <http://example.org/resource#>
PREFIX geosparql: <http://www.opengis.net/ont/geosparql#>
PREFIX geof:       <http://www.opengis.net/def/function/geosparql/>
PREFIX geo:        <http://www.w3.org/2003/01/geo/wgs84_pos#>
PREFIX xsd:        <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdf:        <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX rdfs:       <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX schema:     <http://schema.org/>
PREFIX units:      <http://www.opengis.net/def/uom/OGC/1.0/>

SELECT ?image ?sensor ?sensorLabel
WHERE {
  ?image a goo:NTLImage ;
         goo:fromSensor ?sensor .
  ?sensor a goo:Sensor .
  OPTIONAL { ?sensor rdfs:label ?sensorLabel . }
}
LIMIT 1

predictions.question: During the Hurricane Ian disruption period, which outage records for the southwest Florida county centered on Fort Myers were above 100?
predictions.sparql_query:
PREFIX goo:        <https://ucf-henat.github.io/GeoOutageOnto/#>
PREFIX gokg:       <http://example.org/resource#>
PREFIX geosparql: <http://www.opengis.net/ont/geosparql#>
PREFIX geof:       <http://www.opengis.net/def/function/geosparql/>
PREFIX geo:        <http://www.w3.org/2003/01/geo/wgs84_pos#>
PREFIX xsd:        <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdf:        <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX rdfs:       <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX schema:     <http://schema.org/>
PREFIX units:      <http://www.opengis.net/def/uom/OGC/1.0/>

SELECT ?rec ?county ?countyLabel ?date ?numOutages
WHERE {
  ?county a goo:County ;
          rdfs:label ?countyLabel ;
          goo:locatedInState ?state .
  ?state a goo:State ;
         goo:statePostalCode "FL" .
  FILTER (CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?countyLabel)), "lee"))
  ?rec a goo:CustomerOutageRecord ;
       goo:representsCounty ?county ;
       goo:recordDateTime ?date ;
       goo:numberOfOutages ?numOutages .
  FILTER (?date >= "2022-09-28T00:00:00Z"^^xsd:dateTime && ?date < "2022-10-07T00:00:00Z"^^xsd:dateTime)
  FILTER (?numOutages > 100)
}
ORDER BY ?date
LIMIT 10

sparql_interpretations.label: Ian disruption response window
sparql_interpretations.rationale: The disruption period can reasonably span landfall through the immediate response period in Lee County.
sparql_interpretations.sparql_query:
PREFIX goo:        <https://ucf-henat.github.io/GeoOutageOnto/#>
PREFIX gokg:       <http://example.org/resource#>
PREFIX geosparql: <http://www.opengis.net/ont/geosparql#>
PREFIX geof:       <http://www.opengis.net/def/function/geosparql/>
PREFIX geo:        <http://www.w3.org/2003/01/geo/wgs84_pos#>
PREFIX xsd:        <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdf:        <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX rdfs:       <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX schema:     <http://schema.org/>
PREFIX units:      <http://www.opengis.net/def/uom/OGC/1.0/>

SELECT ?rec ?county ?countyLabel ?date ?numOutages
WHERE {
  ?county a goo:County ;
          rdfs:label ?countyLabel ;
          goo:locatedInState ?state .
  ?state a goo:State ;
         goo:statePostalCode "FL" .
  FILTER (CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?countyLabel)), "lee"))
  ?rec a goo:CustomerOutageRecord ;
       goo:representsCounty ?county ;
       goo:recordDateTime ?date ;
       goo:numberOfOutages ?numOutages .
  FILTER (?date >= "2022-09-28T00:00:00Z"^^xsd:dateTime && ?date < "2022-10-07T00:00:00Z"^^xsd:dateTime)
  FILTER (?numOutages > 100)
}
ORDER BY ?date
LIMIT 10

sparql_interpretations.label: Ian Florida landfall day only
sparql_interpretations.rationale: The disruption period can also be narrowed to the calendar day of Florida landfall.
sparql_interpretations.sparql_query:
PREFIX goo:        <https://ucf-henat.github.io/GeoOutageOnto/#>
PREFIX gokg:       <http://example.org/resource#>
PREFIX geosparql: <http://www.opengis.net/ont/geosparql#>
PREFIX geof:       <http://www.opengis.net/def/function/geosparql/>
PREFIX geo:        <http://www.w3.org/2003/01/geo/wgs84_pos#>
PREFIX xsd:        <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdf:        <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX rdfs:       <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX schema:     <http://schema.org/>
PREFIX units:      <http://www.opengis.net/def/uom/OGC/1.0/>

SELECT ?rec ?county ?countyLabel ?date ?numOutages
WHERE {
  ?county a goo:County ;
          rdfs:label ?countyLabel ;
          goo:locatedInState ?state .
  ?state a goo:State ;
         goo:statePostalCode "FL" .
  FILTER (CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?countyLabel)), "lee"))
  ?rec a goo:CustomerOutageRecord ;
       goo:representsCounty ?county ;
       goo:recordDateTime ?date ;
       goo:numberOfOutages ?numOutages .
  FILTER (?date >= "2022-09-28T00:00:00Z"^^xsd:dateTime && ?date < "2022-09-29T00:00:00Z"^^xsd:dateTime)
  FILTER (?numOutages > 100)
}
ORDER BY ?date
LIMIT 10

predictions.question: During the Hurricane Ian landfall date, which nighttime-light scenes line up with outage snapshots for the southwest Florida county centered on Fort Myers?
Which severity maps correspond to the southwest Florida county centered on Fort Myers around Hurricane Ian?
predictions.sparql_query:
PREFIX goo:        <https://ucf-henat.github.io/GeoOutageOnto/#>
PREFIX gokg:       <http://example.org/resource#>
PREFIX geosparql: <http://www.opengis.net/ont/geosparql#>
PREFIX geof:       <http://www.opengis.net/def/function/geosparql/>
PREFIX geo:        <http://www.w3.org/2003/01/geo/wgs84_pos#>
PREFIX xsd:        <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdf:        <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX rdfs:       <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX schema:     <http://schema.org/>
PREFIX units:      <http://www.opengis.net/def/uom/OGC/1.0/>

SELECT ?map ?image ?imageDate ?county ?countyLabel
WHERE {
  ?county a goo:County ;
          rdfs:label ?countyLabel ;
          goo:locatedInState ?state .
  ?state a goo:State ;
         goo:statePostalCode "FL" .
  FILTER (CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?countyLabel)), "lee"))
  ?image a goo:NTLImage ;
         goo:representsCounty ?county ;
         goo:acquisitionDateTime ?imageDate ;
         goo:hasOutageMap ?map .
  ?map a goo:OutageMap .
  FILTER (?imageDate >= "2022-09-28T00:00:00Z"^^xsd:dateTime && ?imageDate < "2022-10-02T00:00:00Z"^^xsd:dateTime)
}
ORDER BY ?imageDate
LIMIT 10

sparql_interpretations.label: immediate Ian landfall window
sparql_interpretations.rationale: 'Around Hurricane Ian' can refer to the immediate landfall impact window.
sparql_interpretations.sparql_query:
PREFIX goo:        <https://ucf-henat.github.io/GeoOutageOnto/#>
PREFIX gokg:       <http://example.org/resource#>
PREFIX geosparql: <http://www.opengis.net/ont/geosparql#>
PREFIX geof:       <http://www.opengis.net/def/function/geosparql/>
PREFIX geo:        <http://www.w3.org/2003/01/geo/wgs84_pos#>
PREFIX xsd:        <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdf:        <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX rdfs:       <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX schema:     <http://schema.org/>
PREFIX units:      <http://www.opengis.net/def/uom/OGC/1.0/>

SELECT ?map ?image ?imageDate ?county ?countyLabel
WHERE {
  ?county a goo:County ;
          rdfs:label ?countyLabel ;
          goo:locatedInState ?state .
  ?state a goo:State ;
         goo:statePostalCode "FL" .
  FILTER (CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?countyLabel)), "lee"))
  ?image a goo:NTLImage ;
         goo:representsCounty ?county ;
         goo:acquisitionDateTime ?imageDate ;
         goo:hasOutageMap ?map .
  ?map a goo:OutageMap .
  FILTER (?imageDate >= "2022-09-28T00:00:00Z"^^xsd:dateTime && ?imageDate < "2022-10-02T00:00:00Z"^^xsd:dateTime)
}
ORDER BY ?imageDate
LIMIT 10

sparql_interpretations.label: broader Ian disruption window
sparql_interpretations.rationale: The same phrase can include a broader pre- and post-landfall disruption period.
sparql_interpretations.sparql_query:
PREFIX goo:        <https://ucf-henat.github.io/GeoOutageOnto/#>
PREFIX gokg:       <http://example.org/resource#>
PREFIX geosparql: <http://www.opengis.net/ont/geosparql#>
PREFIX geof:       <http://www.opengis.net/def/function/geosparql/>
PREFIX geo:        <http://www.w3.org/2003/01/geo/wgs84_pos#>
PREFIX xsd:        <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdf:        <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX rdfs:       <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX schema:     <http://schema.org/>
PREFIX units:      <http://www.opengis.net/def/uom/OGC/1.0/>

SELECT ?map ?image ?imageDate ?county ?countyLabel
WHERE {
  ?county a goo:County ;
          rdfs:label ?countyLabel ;
          goo:locatedInState ?state .
  ?state a goo:State ;
         goo:statePostalCode "FL" .
  FILTER (CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?countyLabel)), "lee"))
  ?image a goo:NTLImage ;
         goo:representsCounty ?county ;
         goo:acquisitionDateTime ?imageDate ;
         goo:hasOutageMap ?map .
  ?map a goo:OutageMap .
  FILTER (?imageDate >= "2022-09-23T00:00:00Z"^^xsd:dateTime && ?imageDate < "2022-10-07T00:00:00Z"^^xsd:dateTime)
}
ORDER BY ?imageDate
LIMIT 10

predictions.question: For each county, what is the maximum number of customer outages recorded in the year Hurricane Irma occurred in?
predictions.sparql_query:
PREFIX goo:        <https://ucf-henat.github.io/GeoOutageOnto/#>
PREFIX gokg:       <http://example.org/resource#>
PREFIX geosparql: <http://www.opengis.net/ont/geosparql#>
PREFIX geof:       <http://www.opengis.net/def/function/geosparql/>
PREFIX geo:        <http://www.w3.org/2003/01/geo/wgs84_pos#>
PREFIX xsd:        <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdf:        <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX rdfs:       <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX schema:     <http://schema.org/>
PREFIX units:      <http://www.opengis.net/def/uom/OGC/1.0/>

SELECT ?county ?countyLabel (MAX(?numOutages) AS ?maxOutages)
WHERE {
  ?rec a goo:CustomerOutageRecord ;
       goo:representsCounty ?county ;
       goo:recordDateTime ?date ;
       goo:numberOfOutages ?numOutages .
  ?county a goo:County ;
          rdfs:label ?countyLabel .
  FILTER (?date >= "2017-01-01T00:00:00Z"^^xsd:dateTime && ?date < "2018-01-01T00:00:00Z"^^xsd:dateTime)
}
GROUP BY ?county ?countyLabel
ORDER BY DESC(?maxOutages)

predictions.question: For each second-level administrative division in the U.S., what is their average social vulnerability index?
predictions.sparql_query:
PREFIX goo:        <https://ucf-henat.github.io/GeoOutageOnto/#>
PREFIX gokg:       <http://example.org/resource#>
PREFIX geosparql: <http://www.opengis.net/ont/geosparql#>
PREFIX geof:       <http://www.opengis.net/def/function/geosparql/>
PREFIX geo:        <http://www.w3.org/2003/01/geo/wgs84_pos#>
PREFIX xsd:        <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdf:        <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX rdfs:       <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX schema:     <http://schema.org/>
PREFIX units:      <http://www.opengis.net/def/uom/OGC/1.0/>

SELECT ?county ?countyLabel (AVG(?sviScore) AS ?avgSVIOverallScore)
WHERE {
  ?county a goo:County ;
          rdfs:label ?countyLabel .
  ?svi a goo:SVIRecord ;
       goo:representsCounty ?county ;
       goo:sviOverallScore ?sviScore .
}
GROUP BY ?county ?countyLabel
ORDER BY DESC(?avgSVIOverallScore)

predictions.question: On what date and time did each jurisdiction reach its maximum recorded number of customer outages?
Which remote sensing machine and instrument captured any random nighttime-light image in the GeoOutage dataset?
predictions.sparql_query:
PREFIX goo:        <https://ucf-henat.github.io/GeoOutageOnto/#>
PREFIX gokg:       <http://example.org/resource#>
PREFIX geosparql: <http://www.opengis.net/ont/geosparql#>
PREFIX geof:       <http://www.opengis.net/def/function/geosparql/>
PREFIX geo:        <http://www.w3.org/2003/01/geo/wgs84_pos#>
PREFIX xsd:        <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdf:        <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX rdfs:       <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX schema:     <http://schema.org/>
PREFIX units:      <http://www.opengis.net/def/uom/OGC/1.0/>

SELECT ?image ?satellite ?satelliteLabel ?sensor ?sensorLabel
WHERE {
  ?image a goo:NTLImage ;
         goo:fromSatellite ?satellite ;
         goo:fromSensor ?sensor .
  ?satellite a goo:Satellite .
  ?sensor a goo:Sensor .
  OPTIONAL { ?satellite rdfs:label ?satelliteLabel . }
  OPTIONAL { ?sensor rdfs:label ?sensorLabel . }
}
LIMIT 1

predictions.question: Which U.S. county is depicted in the power outage severity map corresponding to a specific customer outage record?

sparql_interpretations.label: under-specified customer outage record
sparql_interpretations.rationale: The question refers to a specific outage record without providing its identifier, so the query returns one county tied to a map-record correspondence.

predictions.question: What is the maximum number of power outages recorded for the county in the third most populous state named after Andrew Jackson in the Eagle-I dataset?
predictions.sparql_query:
PREFIX goo:        <https://ucf-henat.github.io/GeoOutageOnto/#>
PREFIX gokg:       <http://example.org/resource#>
PREFIX geosparql: <http://www.opengis.net/ont/geosparql#>
PREFIX geof:       <http://www.opengis.net/def/function/geosparql/>
PREFIX geo:        <http://www.w3.org/2003/01/geo/wgs84_pos#>
PREFIX xsd:        <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdf:        <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX rdfs:       <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX schema:     <http://schema.org/>
PREFIX units:      <http://www.opengis.net/def/uom/OGC/1.0/>

SELECT ?county ?countyLabel (MAX(?numOutages) AS ?maxOutages)
WHERE {
  ?county a goo:County ;
          rdfs:label ?countyLabel ;
          goo:locatedInState ?state .
  ?state a goo:State ;
         goo:statePostalCode "FL" .
  FILTER (CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?countyLabel)), "duval"))
  ?rec a goo:CustomerOutageRecord ;
       goo:representsCounty ?county ;
       goo:numberOfOutages ?numOutages .
}
GROUP BY ?county ?countyLabel
LIMIT 1

predictions.question: Is there an EAGLE-I snapshot for the Tampa, Florida county that also has a matching NTL scene?
For the central-Florida county where the largest city is named Clermont, what derived severity maps are associated with the VIIRS-captured scene for the month of March in 2024?
How many tropical cyclones were active on the date 6 October 2024 in the Atlantic basin, and what were their names and maximum sustained wind speeds?

On Ian's Florida landfall day, what was the peak outage count in the southwest Florida county centered on Fort Myers, and were any hurricanes active within the general area of the county that day, and if so what were their names?

sparql_interpretations.label: within 100 km of Lee County
sparql_interpretations.rationale: 'General area' can be operationalized as hurricane track observations within a 100 km county buffer.

sparql_interpretations.label: within 50 km of Lee County
sparql_interpretations.rationale: A stricter reading of 'general area' uses a 50 km proximity threshold.

predictions.question: On the day of the Moore tornado, how many tornado records occurred in or within the general area of Cleveland County, Oklahoma, and what were their EF ratings and injury counts?

sparql_interpretations.label: same or neighboring counties
sparql_interpretations.rationale: 'In or within the general area' can be represented by Cleveland County plus neighboring counties.

sparql_interpretations.label: within 50 km spatial buffer
sparql_interpretations.rationale: The same wording can be interpreted as a metric buffer around Cleveland County.

predictions.question: What is the difference between how many storm events were recorded in each state between the year the COVID pandemic started and one decade earlier?
How many and which hurricanes made landfall in Louisiana in the month of August across all years, and when did they make landfall?
What is the ratio of tornadoes to hurricanes to thunderstorms to wildfires in Florida and California?
Which storm events in Florida started before same-county EAGLE-I records that later exceeded 50,000 outages on the same day?
Which NTL images and severity maps provide multimodal evidence for Florida county outage records above 100,000 during the Irma response window?
If Fort Myers's County's outage impact extended to neighboring counties during Hurricane Ian, which neighboring counties had high social vulnerability and high recorded outages?

sparql_interpretations.label: high vulnerability and high outages
sparql_interpretations.rationale: A strict reading treats high vulnerability as SVI >= 0.8 and high outages as more than 10,000.

sparql_interpretations.label: moderately high vulnerability and outages
sparql_interpretations.rationale: Because 'high' is qualitative, a looser operationalization uses SVI >= 0.7 and outages above 1,000.

predictions.question: Which Atlantic and Pacific hurricanes lasted more than three days and reached maximum sustained winds of an extremely powerful cyclone?

sparql_interpretations.label: Category 5 hurricane threshold
sparql_interpretations.rationale: 'Extremely powerful cyclone' can be interpreted as Category 5 intensity, at least 137 kt sustained winds.

sparql_interpretations.label: major hurricane threshold
sparql_interpretations.rationale: A broader interpretation treats extremely powerful as major-hurricane intensity, at least 111 kt sustained winds.

predictions.question: Which counties in the state bordering Alabama and Georgia had an SVI overall score of at least 0.8 in the year before 2023 and a number of storm events recorded that same year?

For the administrative divisions in the U.S. with the highest Social Vulnerability Indexes, what was their SVI at the start of the new millennium, then one decade later, then one decade after that, and what was their population increase in those two decades, and their poverty levels?
Which states have the highest number of hurricane landfalls across all years, and what is each state’s average county-level SVI overall score?
predictions.sparql_query:
PREFIX goo:        <https://ucf-henat.github.io/GeoOutageOnto/#>
PREFIX gokg:       <http://example.org/resource#>
PREFIX geosparql: <http://www.opengis.net/ont/geosparql#>
PREFIX geof:       <http://www.opengis.net/def/function/geosparql/>
PREFIX geo:        <http://www.w3.org/2003/01/geo/wgs84_pos#>
PREFIX xsd:        <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdf:        <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX rdfs:       <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX schema:     <http://schema.org/>
PREFIX units:      <http://www.opengis.net/def/uom/OGC/1.0/>

SELECT ?state ?stateLabel (COUNT(DISTINCT ?hurricane) AS ?hurricaneLandfallCount) (AVG(?sviScore) AS ?avgCountySVIOverallScore)
WHERE {
  ?state a goo:State ;
         rdfs:label ?stateLabel ;
         geosparql:hasGeometry/geosparql:asWKT ?stateWKT .
  ?hurricane a goo:HurricaneEventRecord ;
             goo:hasTrackRecord ?track .
  ?track geosparql:hasGeometry/geosparql:asWKT ?trackWKT .
  FILTER (geof:sfWithin(?trackWKT, ?stateWKT))
  ?county a goo:County ;
          goo:locatedInState ?state .
  ?svi a goo:SVIRecord ;
       goo:representsCounty ?county ;
       goo:sviOverallScore ?sviScore .
}
GROUP BY ?state ?stateLabel
ORDER BY DESC(?hurricaneLandfallCount)
LIMIT 10

sparql_interpretations.label: average SVI across all available county-year records
sparql_interpretations.rationale: The question does not specify an SVI year, so averaging all county-level SVI records is valid.
sparql_interpretations.sparql_query:
PREFIX goo:        <https://ucf-henat.github.io/GeoOutageOnto/#>
PREFIX gokg:       <http://example.org/resource#>
PREFIX geosparql: <http://www.opengis.net/ont/geosparql#>
PREFIX geof:       <http://www.opengis.net/def/function/geosparql/>
PREFIX geo:        <http://www.w3.org/2003/01/geo/wgs84_pos#>
PREFIX xsd:        <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdf:        <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX rdfs:       <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX schema:     <http://schema.org/>
PREFIX units:      <http://www.opengis.net/def/uom/OGC/1.0/>

SELECT ?state ?stateLabel (COUNT(DISTINCT ?hurricane) AS ?hurricaneLandfallCount) (AVG(?sviScore) AS ?avgCountySVIOverallScore)
WHERE {
  ?state a goo:State ;
         rdfs:label ?stateLabel ;
         geosparql:hasGeometry/geosparql:asWKT ?stateWKT .
  ?hurricane a goo:HurricaneEventRecord ;
             goo:hasTrackRecord ?track .
  ?track geosparql:hasGeometry/geosparql:asWKT ?trackWKT .
  FILTER (geof:sfWithin(?trackWKT, ?stateWKT))
  ?county a goo:County ;
          goo:locatedInState ?state .
  ?svi a goo:SVIRecord ;
       goo:representsCounty ?county ;
       goo:sviOverallScore ?sviScore .
}
GROUP BY ?state ?stateLabel
ORDER BY DESC(?hurricaneLandfallCount)
LIMIT 10

sparql_interpretations.label: average 2022 county-level SVI
sparql_interpretations.rationale: A current-vulnerability reading uses the most recent explicit benchmark year, 2022.

predictions.question: On the day of the Moore tornado, how many tornado records occurred within 50 km of Cleveland County, Oklahoma, and what were their EF ratings and injury counts?
Which NTL images and outage-severity maps provide multimodal evidence for Florida county outage records above 250,000 during Hurricane Ian's immediate landfall impact window?

If the county where Hurricane Helene made landfall's outage impact propagated to neighboring counties, which neighboring counties' latest SVI overall scores were substantial and had outage records above 10,000 during the immediate landfall window?

sparql_interpretations.label: substantial SVI as at least 0.75
sparql_interpretations.rationale: The qualitative term 'substantial' can be grounded as SVI overall score >= 0.75.

sparql_interpretations.label: high SVI as at least 0.8
sparql_interpretations.rationale: A stricter vulnerability reading uses the common high-SVI cutoff of 0.8.

predictions.question: Which counties in states neighboring Florida had 2022 SVI housing-and-transportation scores of at least 0.85 and at least five flood-related storm events that same year?

For the southeastern most state's administrative divisions with the highest 2022 SVI housing-and-transportation scores, what were their SVI overall scores in 2000, 2010, and 2022, their population change from 2000 to 2022, and their 2022 poverty rates?
Which Gulf Coast states have the highest number of hurricane landfalls in this century, and what is each state's average county-level SVI overall score?

sparql_interpretations.label: since 2000
sparql_interpretations.rationale: 'This century' is often operationalized in datasets as observations from 2000 onward.

sparql_interpretations.label: strict 21st century since 2001
sparql_interpretations.rationale: A stricter calendar interpretation starts the 21st century on January 1, 2001.

predictions.question: On the day of the Joplin tornado, how many tornado records occurred in or within the general area of the Joplin county, and what were their EF ratings and death counts?
Which counties with high overall SVI scores had a Flood event occur after a Thunderstorm Wind event started within a few days in the same county, and what were the paired event times and SVI scores?

sparql_interpretations.label: high SVI and within three days
sparql_interpretations.rationale: 'High' can be grounded as SVI >= 0.8 and 'a few days' as no more than three days.

sparql_interpretations.label: substantial SVI and within one week
sparql_interpretations.rationale: A looser interpretation treats the sequence window as up to seven days with SVI >= 0.75.

predictions.question: Which counties with high housing and transportation SVI theme scores had a Flash Flood event occur after a Hail event started within about half a day in the same county, and what were the paired event times and SVI theme scores?

sparql_interpretations.label: within twelve hours
sparql_interpretations.rationale: 'About half a day' is most directly represented as a twelve-hour sequence window with high theme score >= 0.8.

predictions.question: Which counties in the hurricane-prone state had high socioeconomic vulnerability in a recent year and a dozen or so wind-related storm events recorded that same year?

sparql_interpretations.label: 2022 with at least twelve wind events
sparql_interpretations.rationale: 'Recent year' can be grounded as 2022 and 'a dozen or so' as at least twelve events.

sparql_interpretations.label: latest SVI year with roughly a dozen wind events
sparql_interpretations.rationale: A stricter qualitative reading uses the latest SVI year and constrains the event count to roughly 10-14.
